name: Speed up nitrocop on ~/Dev/wt-gph-rspec-rip-out with exact 3992 offenses

description: Baseline harness failed to emit metric because python3 is unavailable via mise; need to switch parsing/math helpers to uv run python.

asi.hypothesis: Establish a trustworthy baseline using a 3-sample no-cache median harness with strict 3992-offense invariant.

asi.next_action_hint: Replace python3 invocations in autoresearch.sh with uv run python to make metric extraction reliable.
